scripts.ranker:eval: cd backend && uv run python -m cpg_builder.main compare-rankers --repo .. --out-dir ../artifacts/ranker-compare --base main --head HEAD && uv run python -m cpg_builder.main label-ranker-results --compare-dir ../artifacts/ranker-compare --out ../artifacts/ranker-compare/ranker-labels.jsonl && uv run python scripts/aggregate_ranker_labels.py ../artifacts/ranker-compare/ranker-labels.jsonl
